extraction.one_line_summary: WELLENS Tim attacked inside final kilometer on uphill grind after late crash/pinch point split field, dropped BENNETT George and WOODS Michael in final 200m
tactical_patterns: WELLENS Tim positioned left side before final kick, forcing BENNETT George to drag YATES Simon into position wastefully
Late-race pinch point at 1100m from flamme rouge split peloton tactically more than gradient on final climb
SCHACHMANN Maximilian recovered from crash to contest final kilometer, showing resilience rewarded on technical uphill finishes

rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: positive: superior positioning on left entering final climb allowed him to avoid dragging duties unlike Bennett
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: conserved energy by sitting on BENNETT George's wheel through final grind, limiting time loss despite uphill sprint weakness
rider_signals.BENNETT George: negative: initiated kick too early, burned matches bringing YATES to optimal position without contesting win
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: neutral: contested sprint with pink jersey shoulders but lacked final punch on steeper gradient portions
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: finished with lead group on uphill finish despite not being pure sprinter, gaining time on GC rivals
rider_signals.SÁNCHEZ Luis León: positive: positioned well enough to contest reduced sprint group on technical uphill finish at 38 years old
rider_signals.BARBIN Enrico: positive: won both intermediate KOM sprints to extend blue jersey lead, showing FRAPPORTI unwilling to contest every point
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: positive: crashed before final kilometer but remounted quickly enough to finish in lead group on uphill finish
